markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content production and resolve publishing blockers.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**January Production:** To front-load content before an early Feb CMS freeze, Abnormal will review 10–15 articles/week. This is a temporary surge, with a plan to revisit the cadence in February.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
  - [**December Performance:** Clicks dropped nearly 30% MoM (to 5,332) after irrelevant URLs were disabled. This confirms the new strategy's business impact and urgency.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
  - [**Forecast Justification:** Abdallah needs a reliable forecast to justify the \~$20k/month program cost to leadership. The current review process is the primary blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2022.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** Jo will create a formal proposal detailing the program's value and the impact of publishing delays. Abdallah will use this to align the new Content Director, Warren, and escalate if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)

## Topics

### December Performance & Strategic Pivot

  - [**Click Drop:** Clicks fell nearly 30% MoM (to 5,332) after irrelevant URLs were disabled.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [**Cause:** Primarily the URL disablement, not seasonality.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [**Impact:** Confirms the business risk of publishing delays and the need for a reliable forecast.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1254.0)
  - [**Strategic Pivot:** The focus is shifting from top-funnel glossary pages to mid-funnel blog content (e.g., fingerprinting, phishing, behavioral AI) to drive higher-intent, business-relevant traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1094.0)

### Content Production & Review Process

  - [**January Plan:** Front-load content production before the early February CMS freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
      - [**Abnormal Commitment:** Review 10–15 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [**GrowthX Focus:** Prioritize easier-to-review refreshes and rewrites.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=582.0)
  - [**February Reset:** Use the freeze period to align the new Content Director, Warren, on the process and plan a sustainable ramp-up to 15 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
  - [**Process Blocker:** The current review process is the primary obstacle to scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)
      - [**Context:** Abdallah noted the previous Content Director was hands-off, while interim lead Callie was more risk-averse.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2267.0)
      - [**Goal:** Return to a process with minimal review/edits, similar to the pre-holiday cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2136.0)

### AI Visibility Strategy & Tooling

  - [**Strategic Goal:** Increase Abnormal's visibility in LLM responses.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Proposed Experiment:**](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [**Identify:** Use Scrunch to find business-relevant prompts with 0–2% visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [**Optimize:** For posts ranking in Google's "blue links," optimize for LLM citations. For posts not ranking, optimize for both.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1565.0)
  - [**Scrunch Competitor List Update:**](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
      - [**Add:** Checkpoint, Sublime.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)
      - [**Keep:** Darktrace, Proofpoint, Mimecast, Avanan (despite mid-market focus).](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2679.0)
      - [Create a formal renewal proposal detailing program value, the impact of publishing delays, and the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2679.0)
      - [Share the proposal with Abdallah next week.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2866.0)
      - [Update the Scrunch competitor list.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=1610.0)
  - [**Abdallah:**](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)
      - [Use the proposal to align Warren and leadership on the need for a scalable review process.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2589.0)
      - [Escalate to VPs if the process remains a blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2310.0)
  - [**Abnormal Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=629.0)
      - [Review 10–15 articles/week in January.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
      - [Align with Warren during the February freeze on the post-freeze ramp-up plan.](https://fathom.video/share/93_xSVzWsbVgQsvFySQRy3HyYvBLwWwb?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
